summary: Iteration 49: Ankylos C/X Drilling Protocol Testing - 18/18 tests PASSED (100%). All Ankylos drilling protocol features verified working correctly.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native/Expo app, not web frontend)

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (GET /api/drilling-protocols/available): PASS - Ankylos C/X listed with implant_series, size_database, and drill_mapping fields
Feature 2 (A Series 3.5mm/Red): PASS - Returns correct protocol with Twist Drill 2.9mm, series=A, color=Red
Feature 3 (B Series 4.5mm/Yellow): PASS - Returns correct protocol with Twist Drill 3.8mm, series=B, color=Yellow
Feature 4 (C Series 5.5mm/Blue): PASS - Returns correct protocol with Twist Drill 4.7mm, series=C, color=Blue
Feature 5 (D Series 7.0mm/Green): PASS - Returns correct protocol with Twist Drill 5.7mm, series=D, color=Green
Feature 6 (Dense bone D1/D2): PASS - Includes Tap step, making total 7 steps
Feature 7 (Soft bone D3/D4): PASS - Does NOT include Tap step, making total 6 steps
Feature 8 (ankylos_info response): PASS - Contains series, color, twist_drill, and implant_series fields
Feature 9 (Conical Reamer format): PASS - Uses series letter + length format (e.g., B11, A14)
Feature 10 (Insertion torque): PASS - Returns 25-35 Ncm (not 35-45 Ncm)
Feature 11 (Protocol type): PASS - Includes series info (e.g., 'Standard Protocol (B Series / Yellow)')
Feature 12 (PDF export): PASS - POST /api/drilling-protocols/export-pdf returns 200 with PDF content

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per request - React Native app)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ankylos C/X drilling protocol fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: DRILLING_PROTOCOLS['Dentsply Sirona|Ankylos C/X'] at line 4167 in server.py, _generate_ankylos_protocol function at line 4190. Protocol has 4 series (A/Red/3.5mm, B/Yellow/4.5mm, C/Blue/5.5mm, D/Green/7.0mm). Dense bone (D1/D2) adds Tap step (7 total steps), soft bone (D3/D4) has 6 steps. Insertion torque is 25-35 Ncm. Conical Reamer uses format like 'B11' (series + length).
